# Hudson Valley Cabinet & Woodworking Inc

> General Contractor serving Hudson, NY and surrounding areas. Hudson Valley Cabinet & Woodworking Inc provides quality contractor services in Hudson, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Hudson Valley Cabinet & Woodworking Inc
- Category: General Contractor
- Location: Serving Hudson Valley, NY, Hudson, NY
- Phone: +1 518-828-4500
- Email: contact@hudson-valley-cabinet-woodworking-inc.com
- Rating: 4.5/5 from 12 reviews
- Years in business: 10
- Jobs completed: 200
